  sl  local_address                         remote_address                      st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 00000000000000000000000001000000:0016 00000000000000000000000000000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000     1000        0 55555 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   1: 00000000000000000000000002000000:1F90 00000000000000000000000003000000:01BB 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000     1000        0 66666 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
